MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-07-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was uncontested. DEFENDANT THOMAS HARRIS' MOTION TO STRIKE Portions of the Pleadings Seeking Damages For Activities Protected by Civil Code 47(b) and Seeking Damages Not Recoverable Under The Cause Of Action Pled is Granted. Plaintiff filed a notice of non-opposition on September 24, 2014. After hearing, the Court modified and signed the proposed order submitted with the moving papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Off Calendar Aug-25-2014 Continued To Nov-12-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
